businessQuestion: How has supplier on-time delivery performance changed over the last 12 months?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DD.FISCAL_YEAR,
    DD.FISCAL_MONTH,
    DS.SUPPLIER_NAME,
    ROUND(AVG(FSD.IS_ON_TIME) * 100,2) AS ON_TIME_RATE_PCT,
    AVG(FSD.DELAY_DAYS) AS AVG_DELAY_DAYS
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SUPPLIER_DELIVERY FSD
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_SUPPLIER DS
    ON FSD.SUPPLIER_KEY = DS.SUPPLIER_KEY
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_DATE DD
    ON FSD.DATE_KEY = DD.DATE_KEY
GROUP BY
    DD.FISCAL_YEAR,
    DD.FISCAL_MONTH,
    DS.SUPPLIER_NAME
ORDER BY
    DD.FISCAL_YEAR,
    DD.FISCAL_MONTH,
    ON_TIME_RATE_PCT;
businessContext: Supply chain leadership wants to monitor supplier reliability trends and identify vendors whose delivery performance has deteriorated.
